channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The road surface is unsafe for cyclists, 2nd March
item.description:
Goswell Road has been allowed to deteriorate. It is unsafe for cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree ornaments are very nice, 2nd March
item.description:
But how about removing them? It’s not Christmas anymore =)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-4, London Bridge Walk, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass near primary school, 2nd March
item.description:
Smashed glass, clean it up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole on roundabout and junction, 2nd March
item.description:
The pothole on the roundabout Bexley Road/ Park Crescent/ Carlton Road has been there for nearly a year. There are also potholes near the junction of the roundabout on Bexley Road/ Park Crescent. These have been temporarily filled before but the patch comes out almost as soon as it's filled leaving the potholes the same or worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction waste regularly left outside, 2nd March
item.description:
Building works have been going on for months and they regularly leave construction waste and litter on the pavement and road for several days at a time.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colenso Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins on pavements for months, 2nd March
item.description:
Outside number 9 and 11 spring vale Bexleyheath the owners leave their bins on the pavement. There are 4 outside number 9 and 3 at number 11. They have been there for months. Please get these remove by asking them to keep on their own drives as they smell and when I walk past with my children they are always brush my kids coats. Also I cannot get pram past
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spring Vale, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped large shredder, 2nd March
item.description:
Dumped large shredder

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 237, Kennington Lane, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Champion Park SE5, side of entrance to Denmark Hill station. Non-offensive tags on recycling receptacles., 2nd March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Champion Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Lamp not working, 2nd March
item.description:
Street lamp outside 116 Carlton Road Erith not working. Steps to properties unlit.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Action Needed – Dog Urine in Lift, 2nd March
item.description:
Subject: Urgent Action Needed – Dog Urine in Lift Dear Housing Building Management, Woodsford Portland Street London I am writing to raise a serious and ongoing issue in our building. For several months, some dog owners have been allowing their dogs to urinate in the lift on a daily basis. The smell is extremely strong, making it difficult for residents to use the lift, and it is particularly harmful to those with asthma or respiratory conditions. Previous letters or notices do not seem to have resolved the problem. Immediate action is needed, as this situation is affecting residents’ health and well-being. It is concerning that some dog owners are not respecting other residents’ right to a clean and safe living environment. We kindly request that the Council take urgent measures to stop this behavior and ensure the lifts are cleaned and maintained properly. Your prompt attention to this matter would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your understanding and action. Kind regards,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped outside the vicarage back garden, 2nd March
item.description:
Someone fly tipped a sofa by the door to the vicarage back garden black door

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivydale Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Hole in /Road after repair, 2nd March
item.description:
The pothole is on Haselbury Rd Southbound near the junction with Church Street, just before the width restriction and was previously repaired by Enfield Council's contractors a couple of months ago. The filling has now totally come out of the hole as the repair appears to have been badly carried out as the. This was not a temporary patch but a full repair that was badly done. It will affect all road users as the road width narrows just after and it can't be avoided.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haselbury Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White line disappearing. Needs repainting, 2nd March
item.description:
The white line which I had painted in the road across my drive has faded badly and disappeared in places so cars park on it, often blocking my drive. Please can you repaint it?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 143/145 Victoria Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Kerb stone displaced by tree is huge trip hazard and prevents parking space being used as cannot open car fires without damage to car door (which cannot be seen by driver when parking)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported - enquiry reference is 8861566., 2nd March
item.description:
Your report says you are still looking into this but now we've had a couple of days of dry weather the water has disappeared. Buit there is still mud in the road by the kerb and a bump in the tarmac outside my main driveway entrance which leads to my front door.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box junction marks need repainting, 2nd March
item.description:
The yellow box junction markings are almost non existence. They need repainting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Hill, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
